case_title: BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT. 304: COURT, ON ITS OWN MOTION, DESIGNATES THIS ACTION COMPLEX LITIGATION AND SINGLY ASSIGNED TO JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER FOR ALL PURPOSES. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-25-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 304. APR-22-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATORY RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-22-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-18-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-07-2011 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
NOTICE OF RELATED CASE: CGC-10-498514 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC

NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE, PREVIOUSLY SET FOR JAN-25-2011, IS CONTINUED TO FEB-17-2011, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 304, AT THE PARTIES REQUEST. COUNSEL TO SEND NOTICE. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 304.

DEPT. 304: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. SEE MINUTES IN CGC-10-498514. THIS ACTION IS ORDERED CONSOLIDATED INTO LEAD CASE ACTION NO. CGC-10-498514, BHR OPERATIONS V. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. ALL FURTHER FILINGS AND ENTRIES MUST BE IN CGC-10-498514. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK: JOSE RIOS-MERIDA; COURT REPORTER: JANET POND. JRM/304.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC SERVED JAN-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
OBJECTION PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULES 3.6(A) AND 6.0(C) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
COMPLEX LITIGATION CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-17-2011 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-17-2011 AT 2:30 PM IN 304. NOTICE BY PLAINTIFF COUNSEL.
ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-505526 WITH CASE CGC-10-498514, ORDER; ALL FURTHER ENTRIES UNDER CASE CGC-10-498514
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
